app.name: Open Resource Discovery Explorer
app.one_liner: A tool to explore and visualize self-described APIs, events, and capabilities using the Open Resource Discovery (ORD) protocol.

screens.name: Resource Dashboard
screens.purpose: Display a list of discovered ORD resources with filters by type (API, Event, Capability), status, and relationships.

rust_commands.name: load_ord_manifest
rust_commands.purpose: Fetch and parse an ORD-compliant JSON manifest from a given URL or file path.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add support for navigating relatedApiResources and relatedEventResources
week 1: Render basic resource list from parsed manifest
acceptance_tests: Given an ORD manifest containing an ApiResource with relatedEventResources, the system displays clickable links to those events.
When a Package includes a 'files' property with a PDF documentation link, the UI renders a download button for that file.
